title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.186 - Seal and bylaws
text:
375.186.  Seal and bylaws. — The corporators or directors of any insurance company organized under the laws of this state shall have power to adopt a seal, and to make such bylaws, not inconsistent with the constitution and laws of this state, as they may deem necessary for the regulation and management of its affairs.
(RSMo 1939 § 6021, A.L. 1967 p. 516)
